issue_title: guardProtectedRoutesUntilEmailIsVerified and anonymous Login don't work together
issue_body_preview:
### Bug Report or Feature Request (mark with an `x`)
```
- [x ] bug report -> please search issues before submitting
- [ ] feature request
```

### OS and Version?
Windows 10

### Versions

Angular CLI: 8.1.3
Node: 10.14.2
OS: win32 x64
Angular: 8.1.3
... animations, cli, common, comp
test_description_zh: 在 ngx-auth-firebaseui 项目中，启用 guardProtectedRoutesUntilEmailIsVerified 配置后，使用匿名登录方式进行登录，观察登录后的路由跳转和页面显示是否正常。
expected_result_zh: 启用 guardProtectedRoutesUntilEmailIsVerified 时，匿名登录用户应能正常登录并访问受保护的路由页面，页面正常显示内容，不会被错误地拦截或重定向到邮箱验证页面。
